title: Samskee's Slightly Spiced Cozy Pack
description: A cozy yet adventurous pack that adds QoL, biome enhancements and mob variety!
body:
## °❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ Welcome! °❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

> **Slightly Spiced** is a pack I made for fun that I can use for my survival series and maybe anyone else who wants to try it! As the name describes, there's both a cozy experience to relax with as well as paths to have a more spicy experience if you so choose to follow them!

### °❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ Features °❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

> It includes 200+ of my go-to mods such as _Regions Unexplored_, _Terralith_ and _Geophilic_ for beautiful biomes, some QoL mods that include _Sophisticated Backpacks_, _Xaero's Map_ & _Minimap_ and _RightClickHarvest_. You can also find some additional creatures in this pack with _Critter's & Companions_, _Friends&Foes_ and _Wilder Wild_ adding lots of variety into your world. Finally there's additions like _Bosses of Mass Destruction_ and _Deep & Darker_ to **spice up** the world if you like to gear up and take on more difficult tasks!

### °❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ Recommended °❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

> If you are going to try this I recommend dedicating at least **6-8GB** of ram for it to run smoothly!

> Includes **_shader support_** with a few of my favourite shaders for all types of setups!

> **Slightly Spiced Cozy Survival** is my series on Youtube, you can check it out [here](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoJt4XBWM5h2Dtvv3lcRUpr5btaMwU8kZ&si=VW0RR65zF5c36vza)!
